TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Cihafayan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hong ring song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 101 buwan, 221 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 83% kyan ku 183 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 17% kyan ku 38 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 77%, Truku 1%, Tayan 2%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cihafayan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Cihafayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cihafayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cihafayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cihafayan hya' ga Cirakayan. tay 'zil na Cihafayan hya' ga Sariwsiw. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiħa*ajan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħoŋ riŋ s~ɕoŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, tajan *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiħa*ajan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiħa*ajan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiħa*ajan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiħa*ajan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiħa*ajan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨirakajan. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiħa*ajan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕariws~ɕiw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Cihafayan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hong ring song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 101 buwan, 221 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 83% kyan ku 183 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 17% kyan ku 38 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 77%, Truku 1%, Tayan 2%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cihafayan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Cihafayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cihafayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cihafayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cihafayan hya' ga Cirakayan. tay 'zil na Cihafayan hya' ga Sariwsiw. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiħa*ajan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħoŋ riŋ s~ɕoŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, tajan *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiħa*ajan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiħa*ajan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiħa*ajan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiħa*ajan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiħa*ajan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨirakajan. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiħa*ajan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕariws~ɕiw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
